category_sources: source_facts.description says Lisp-like general-purpose scripting language; official manual describes newLISP as a Lisp-like scripting language.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is newlisp; official homepage and manual use newLISP capitalization.
docs_sources: Official newLISP manual and reference index hosted on newlisp.org.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; no official source-control repository was identified, while source_facts.source-archive points to the official newlisp.org release tarball.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and executables; official manual describes newLISP core language, command-line options, networking APIs, and scripting use.
